reason: Contains ISIS terminology including 'wilayat' (province), references to attacks on 'apostates', and uses ISIS media formatting style with the hashtag Islamic_State. The '(watch before deletion)' phrase is also common in ISIS propaganda posts.
original_post: ولاية صلاح الدين // مرئي || هجوم الاباة على المرتدين في المصفاة ( شاهد قبل الحذف ) #الدولة_الإسلامية
